scripts.cf:build: npm run cf:build:raw && npm run cf:patch-worker
scripts.cf:preview: npm run cf:build && node scripts/run-node-tool.mjs opennextjs-cloudflare preview
scripts.cf:deploy: npm run cf:check && npm run cf:build && node scripts/run-node-tool.mjs wrangler deploy
scripts.cf:dry-run: npm run cf:check && npm run cf:build && node scripts/run-node-tool.mjs wrangler deploy --dry-run --outdir .wrangler/dry-run
scripts.d1:migrate:local: node scripts/run-node-tool.mjs wrangler d1 migrations apply citationgen-nlm --local
scripts.d1:migrate:remote: node scripts/run-node-tool.mjs wrangler d1 migrations apply citationgen-nlm --remote
scripts.d1:seed:local: npm run d1:export:nlm && node scripts/run-node-tool.mjs wrangler d1 execute citationgen-nlm --local --file=data/nlm-journals-d1.sql
scripts.d1:seed:remote: npm run d1:export:nlm && node scripts/run-node-tool.mjs wrangler d1 execute citationgen-nlm --remote --file=data/nlm-journals-d1.sql
